title: Michelia leveilleana
taxonomy: Michelia leveilleana is a species within the family Magnoliaceae. This family consists of over 200 species of flowering plants. The Magnoliaceae family is part of the order Magnoliales, which is a group of flowering plants. The order Magnoliales is part of the subclass Magnoliidae, within the class Magnoliopsida.
